items.name: surfaces
items.title: Surfaces
items.description: Eight-level surface and shadow ladder for elevation. Light: two color steps then flat white, differentiated by shadow. Dark: additive white-opacity ladder with layered inset highlights and drops.

light.shadow-6: 0 0 0 1px var(--shadow-color), 0 1px 1px -0.5px var(--shadow-color), 0 3px 3px -1.5px var(--shadow-color), 0 6px 6px -3px var(--shadow-color), 0 12px 12px -6px var(--shadow-color), 0 24px 24px -12px var(--shadow-color)
light.shadow-7: 0 0 0 1px var(--shadow-color), 0 1px 1px -0.5px var(--shadow-color), 0 3px 3px -1.5px var(--shadow-color), 0 6px 6px -3px var(--shadow-color), 0 12px 12px -6px var(--shadow-color), 0 24px 24px -12px var(--shadow-color), 0 48px 48px -24px var(--shadow-color)
light.shadow-8: 0 0 0 1px var(--shadow-color), 0 1px 1px -0.5px var(--shadow-color), 0 3px 3px -1.5px var(--shadow-color), 0 6px 6px -3px var(--shadow-color), 0 12px 12px -6px var(--shadow-color), 0 24px 24px -12px var(--shadow-color), 0 48px 48px -24px var(--shadow-color), 0 96px 96px -48px var(--shadow-color)

dark.shadow-3: inset 0 1px 0 0 var(--dm-hi-mid), inset 0 0 0 1px var(--dm-ring-base), 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.12), 0 1px 1px -0.5px var(--dm-drop), 0 3px 3px -1.5px var(--dm-drop)
dark.shadow-4: inset 0 1px 0 0 var(--dm-hi-mid), inset 0 0 0 1px var(--dm-ring-mid), 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.14), 0 1px 1px -0.5px var(--dm-drop), 0 3px 3px -1.5px var(--dm-drop), 0 6px 6px -3px var(--dm-drop)
dark.shadow-5: inset 0 1px 0 0 var(--dm-hi-high), inset 0 0 0 1px var(--dm-ring-mid), 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.16), 0 1px 1px -0.5px var(--dm-drop), 0 3px 3px -1.5px var(--dm-drop), 0 6px 6px -3px var(--dm-drop), 0 12px 12px -6px var(--dm-drop)
dark.shadow-6: inset 0 1px 0 0 var(--dm-hi-high), inset 0 0 0 1px var(--dm-ring-high), 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.18), 0 1px 1px -0.5px var(--dm-drop), 0 3px 3px -1.5px var(--dm-drop), 0 6px 6px -3px var(--dm-drop), 0 12px 12px -6px var(--dm-drop), 0 24px 24px -12px var(--dm-drop)
dark.shadow-7: inset 0 1px 0 0 var(--dm-hi-peak), inset 0 0 0 1px var(--dm-ring-high), 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.20), 0 1px 1px -0.5px var(--dm-drop), 0 3px 3px -1.5px var(--dm-drop), 0 6px 6px -3px var(--dm-drop), 0 12px 12px -6px var(--dm-drop), 0 24px 24px -12px var(--dm-drop), 0 48px 48px -24px var(--dm-drop)
dark.shadow-8: inset 0 1px 0 0 var(--dm-hi-peak), inset 0 0 0 1px var(--dm-ring-high), 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.22), 0 1px 1px -0.5px var(--dm-drop), 0 3px 3px -1.5px var(--dm-drop), 0 6px 6px -3px var(--dm-drop), 0 12px 12px -6px var(--dm-drop), 0 24px 24px -12px var(--dm-drop), 0 48px 48px -24px var(--dm-drop), 0 96px 96px -48px var(--dm-drop)

items.name: utils
items.title: Utilities
items.description: Utility function for merging Tailwind CSS classes with clsx and tailwind-merge.

items.name: springs
items.title: Spring Animations
items.description: Spring animation token presets for Framer Motion (fast, moderate, slow).

items.name: font-weight
items.title: Font Weight Tokens
items.description: Variable font weight tokens for Inter (normal, medium, semibold, bold) using font-variation-settings.

items.name: surface-context
items.title: Surface Context
items.description: React context that tracks the current substrate elevation level. Elevated components (Dropdown, Select, etc.) read it via useSurface() and render at substrate + offset, then re-provide a new substrate so further nesting elevates further.

items.name: surface-classes
items.title: Surface Class Lookup
items.description: Static lookup tables for bg-surface-N and shadow-surface-N utilities. Required because Tailwind v4 cannot detect template-literal class names.

items.name: elevated
items.title: Elevated
items.description: Elevation primitive. Wraps the read-substrate / compute-level / apply-classes / re-provide-context pattern into one component. Pulls in the surface theme tokens, substrate context, and class lookup so a single install drops in the whole elevation system.

items.name: shape-context
items.title: Shape Context
items.description: React context provider for runtime shape variant switching (pill or rounded). Controls border-radius across all Fluid Functionalism components.

items.name: icon-context
items.title: Icon Context
items.description: React context provider for runtime icon library switching with Lucide fallback.

items.name: icon-map
items.title: Icon Map
items.description: Canonical icon name mapping across Lucide, Tabler, Phosphor, and HugeIcons.

items.name: use-proximity-hover
items.title: useProximityHover
items.description: React hook for proximity-based hover detection. Tracks the closest item to the mouse cursor within a container, enabling smooth animated background indicators.

items.name: use-merge-split
items.title: useMergeSplitBlocks
items.description: React hook + renderer for the selected-background merge/split animation. When one row bridges or splits two contiguous selected runs, their inner edges glide together (or apart) and swap to a single block, instead of one block spring-growing over the union.

items.name: accordion
items.title: Accordion
items.description: Collapsible accordion with animated height transitions, spring-animated chevron, and proximity hover in grouped mode. Built on Radix UI Accordion.

items.name: accordion-base
items.title: Accordion (Base UI)
items.description: Collapsible accordion with animated height transitions, spring-animated chevron, and proximity hover in grouped mode. Base UI flavor.

items.name: ask-user-questions
items.title: Ask User Questions
items.description: Stepped question flow with numbered options, keyboard shortcuts (1–9), single or multi-select, inline 'other' text input, optional skip, proximity-based hover, and multi-question navigation. Auto-advances on selection in single-select.

items.name: badge
items.title: Badge
items.description: Compact label with solid and dot variants, Tailwind color palette, and three sizes.

items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: Animated button with variants (primary, secondary, tertiary, ghost), icon support, loading spinner, and fluid font-weight transitions on hover.

items.name: button-base
items.title: Button (Base UI)
items.description: Animated button with variants (primary, secondary, tertiary, ghost), icon support, loading spinner, and fluid font-weight transitions on hover. Base UI flavor.

items.name: dropdown
items.title: Dropdown
items.description: Dropdown menu with proximity-based hover tracking, animated selection indicator, and animated focus ring. Includes MenuItem sub-component.

items.name: checkbox-group
items.title: Checkbox Group
items.description: Animated checkbox group with proximity hover, contiguous selection merging, and spring-animated check marks. Built on Radix UI Checkbox.

items.name: checkbox-group-base
items.title: Checkbox Group (Base UI)
items.description: Animated checkbox group with proximity hover, contiguous selection merging, and spring-animated check marks. Base UI flavor.

items.name: radio-group
items.title: Radio Group
items.description: Animated radio group with proximity hover, spring-animated selection dot, and optional Radix UI integration. Supports both controlled index and value-based APIs.

items.name: radio-group-base
items.title: Radio Group (Base UI)
items.description: Animated radio group with proximity hover, spring-animated selection dot. Base UI flavor.

items.name: alert-dialog
items.title: Alert Dialog
items.description: Animated modal alert dialog that interrupts the user and expects a response. Built on Radix UI Alert Dialog with header, footer, title, description, cancel, and action sub-components.

items.name: alert-dialog-base
items.title: Alert Dialog (Base UI)
items.description: Animated modal alert dialog that interrupts the user and expects a response. Base UI flavor.

items.name: dialog
items.title: Dialog
items.description: Animated modal dialog with spring-based scale and opacity transitions. Built on Radix UI Dialog with overlay, header, footer, title, and description sub-components.

items.name: dialog-base
items.title: Dialog (Base UI)
items.description: Animated modal dialog with spring-based scale and opacity transitions. Base UI flavor.

items.name: input-copy
items.title: Input Copy
items.description: Read-only input with a copy-to-clipboard button and animated check feedback. Supports optional label and shape context.

items.name: input-group
items.title: Input Group
items.description: Grouped input fields with proximity-based highlighting, animated label transitions, optional icons, and error states.

items.name: input-message
items.title: Input Message
items.description: Chat-style message composer with auto-resizing textarea, drag-and-drop file attachments (PNG / JPEG / PDF), flexible left/right action slots, and a built-in send button on a Surface-2 substrate.

items.name: file-thumbnail
items.title: File Thumbnail
items.description: Read-only square preview of a File. Images render via object-cover; PDFs render their first page via pdfjs; a spinner shows while either resolves. Adapts its corner radius to the global shape setting.

items.name: chat-message
items.title: Chat Message
items.description: A single chat transcript entry with baked-in entrance and layout motion. Right-aligned accent bubble for the user, left-aligned muted bubble for the assistant, with optional file attachments. Adapts to the global shape setting.

items.name: tabs-subtle
items.title: Tabs Subtle
items.description: Horizontal tab navigation with proximity hover, animated pill selection indicator, and fluid font-weight transitions. Supports icons and keyboard navigation.

items.name: switch
items.title: Switch
items.description: Animated toggle switch with spring-based thumb animation and fluid font-weight label transitions. Built on Radix UI Switch.

items.name: switch-base
items.title: Switch (Base UI)
items.description: Animated toggle switch with spring-based thumb animation and fluid font-weight label transitions. Base UI flavor.

items.name: table
items.title: Table
items.description: Animated table with proximity-based row hover highlighting and fluid border transitions. Includes TableHeader, TableBody, TableRow, TableHead, and TableCell sub-components.

items.name: slider
items.title: Slider
items.description: Animated slider with spring-snapped thumb, step dots, range mode, and click-to-edit value display. Built on Radix UI Slider.

items.name: slider-base
items.title: Slider (Base UI)
items.description: Animated slider with spring-snapped thumb, step dots, range mode, and click-to-edit value display. Base UI flavor.

items.name: tabs
items.title: Tabs
items.description: Segmented control tabs with sliding active indicator, proximity hover, and spring animations. Built on Radix UI Tabs.

items.name: tabs-base
items.title: Tabs (Base UI)
items.description: Segmented control tabs with sliding active indicator, proximity hover, and spring animations. Base UI flavor.

items.name: thinking-indicator
items.title: Thinking Indicator
items.description: Animated loading indicator with morphing SVG path (circle to infinity loop) and shimmer text rotation. Cycles through customizable status words.

items.name: select
items.title: Select
items.description: Animated select menu with proximity hover, bordered/borderless variants, optional leading icons, spring-animated popover, and animated checkmark indicator.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: Tooltip
items.description: Floating tooltip with spring-based animations, configurable placement, and rich content support.

items.name: tooltip-base
items.title: Tooltip (Base UI)
items.description: Floating tooltip with spring-based animations, configurable placement, and rich content support. Base UI flavor.

items.name: thinking-steps
items.title: Thinking Steps
items.description: Chain-of-thought reasoning display with collapsible steps, sequential animation, source badges, and image support.

items.name: color-picker
items.title: Color Picker
items.description: Color picker with HEX, RGB, HSL, and OKLCH formats, alpha channel, optional swatches, and a popover trigger. Built on the Slider component with native EyeDropper support.
